basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Kanpur is recruiting 1 Project Engineer post in Robotics under the Department of Electrical Engineering on contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech degree in Electrical Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics and allied areas. OR B.Tech degree in Electrical Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics and allied areas with at least 3 years relevant experience.
qualification.experience: Strong hands-on experience in development and testing of robots, hardware design, fabrication, integration, troubleshooting, control systems, sensors, actuators, MATLAB, etc.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview / further selection process as decided by the institute. The position is purely contractual in nature.
how_to_apply: Candidates must fill the online application form on or before **01 June 2026** using the link given below. Please fill the form carefully.
Application Link: Click Here to Apply
For any technical issues while accessing the form, contact: [email protected]
important_instructions: The position is purely contractual and temporary in nature. Selected candidate will work primarily on mathematical modeling, design, simulation, and hardware development of robotic systems. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in IIT Kanpur. Candidates must have strong knowledge of MATLAB and hands-on robotics experience.
